query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: A grayscale portrait of a young man with short dark hair wearing a dark polo shirt with a light collar, photographed against a plain neutral background. Multiple overlapping translucent exposures of his face and upper body create layered profiles facing left and right while his central frontal face remains most prominent.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal grayscale portrait using double exposure technique to show a young man with short dark hair in a dark polo shirt, his face multiplied into ghostly overlapping profiles that float translucently around his central figure, creating a dreamlike fragmented identity effect against a plain background.
